info.name: transformation-svc - Local Transform API
info.description:
Tests the local-only FastAPI wrapper (app.py) around erp_transform.orchestrator. This is the Python port of the Postgres transform_payload()/apply_field_transform() functions, exposed as a real HTTP endpoint so it can be exercised from Postman the same way as the SQL RPC endpoint in ../../documentation/postman. Never sends a request to any external/client system -- only reads pipeline config from the local Postgres and returns the transformed JSON body. Start the app first: `python app.py` or `uvicorn app:app --reload --port 8000`. Swagger UI at http://localhost:8000/docs.

Primary entry point is /transform-pipeline (pipeline_id) since a real caller like a CRM knows the pipeline identifier, not the internal step_pk. /transform (step_pk) is kept for direct single-step debugging.

Error responses follow FastAPI/Pydantic conventions: request-validation failures (missing/wrong-typed fields) return 422 with a `detail` array; application-level not-found errors (raised as HTTPException) return 404 with a plain string `detail`.

item.name: 01 - Transform By Pipeline ID (primary entry point)
Transform Full Oracle Contract Pipeline (single step)

item.name: Transform PAT-03 Pipeline (multi-step: lookup-project then create-contract)

exec: pm.test('both steps present in seq order', () => {
pm.test('lookup-project has no body (GET/extract step, no field_mapping rows)', () => {
pm.test('ProjectId is null since lookup-project GET was never actually sent', () => {
